unavailable_msg:
The door is locked...
It appears someone stuck a political flyer on the door: "MCMONEYPANTS FOR PRESIDENT".
first_dialog: Hello? You'd better not be from the McMoneyPants presidential campaign, I'm sick of all of the ads...
first_job_offer: Oh, alright, I was meaning to mow it myself today, but I guess I can do something else now.
